diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
     num_skills = test_data['num_skills']

     

     # Initialize model - match the architecture used in training

-    model = DKTModel(num_skills=num_skills, hidden_size=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2)
